docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVENWORTH-GREENWICH PROPERTIES
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVENWORTH-GREENWICH PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $543.50 FILED BY KIRBY, JAMES T. AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVENWORTH-GREENWICH PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRBY, JAMES T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEAVENWORTH-GREENWICH PROPERTIES $793.50 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $814.50, PLFT'S REQUEST TO AMEND CLAIM TO $793.50 IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
